ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "ndc9" TEXT /* NDC-9 (Product) code */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "major_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major therapeutic class */,
  "minor_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the minor therapeutic class */,
  "administration_route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administration route */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was approved by regulatory authorities */,
  "approval_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the approval status of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the product data to track changes over time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently active or discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_minor_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("minor_class_id") REFERENCES minor_classes ("minor_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_administration_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("administration_route_id") REFERENCES administration_routes ("administration_route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_major_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_class_id") REFERENCES major_classes ("major_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "ndc11" TEXT /* NDC-11 (Package) code */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the product in the package */,
  "package_effective_date" TEXT /* Date the package became effective */,
  "package_discontinuation_date" TEXT /* Date the package was discontinued */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the package */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Unique batch number for the package */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the package */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the package */,
  "is_recall" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the package has been recalled */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the package is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_classes" (
  "major_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major class */,
  "major_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the major therapeutic class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the major class is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minor_classes" (
  "minor_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minor class */,
  "minor_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the minor therapeutic class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the minor class */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the minor class is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minor_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administration_routes" (
  "administration_route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administration route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the administration route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the administration route */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the administration route is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administration_route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seer_rx_categories" (
  "seer_rx_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SEER*Rx category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the SEER*Rx category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SEER*Rx category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the SEER*Rx category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seer_rx_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_seer_rx_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "seer_rx_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the SEER*Rx category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the mapping between the product and SEER*Rx category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "seer_rx_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the package in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the package is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the package */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the package */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory level is critical */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the inventory entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the location is currently active */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the location */,
  "is_full" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the location is full */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the package used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the package was used */,
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of usage */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage event is currently active */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_usage_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_usage_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_type_id") REFERENCES usage_types ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage type */,
  "usage_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., R&D, Manufacturing, Sales) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access log is currently active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
